title: schoenoplectus litoralis var. pterolepis
intro: Schoenoplectus litoralis var. pterolepis, also known as salt-marsh bulrush or salt-marsh club-rush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the cattail family (Typhaceae). It is a type of wetland plant found in salt marshes, estuaries, and coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Schoenoplectus litoralis var. pterolepis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for herbal use.
